annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest at Pennsylvania’s legal rate of 6% per annum — 42 Pa.C.S. §8101 sets judgment interest at "the lawful rate," which 41 P.S. §202 fixes at 6%. Simple interest; written into statute and unchanged for decades. A contract judgment can carry a higher lawful contract rate if the documents set one. Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
